blended.narrative: Keystone is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 10,244 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
